name: Toypedo Bandits - Sun Squad™: Pool Diving Game Set, Ages 5+, 4 Pieces
description:
Sun Squad Toypedo Bandits are a 4-pack of torpedo-shaped dive toys that rocket through the pool with amazing hydrodynamic action! These miniature Toypedos glide stealthily underwater up to 20 feet and are easy for little hands to grip and throw. Great for everyday play, pool parties, and to encourage young swimmers to practice their swimming skills. Pick up a few packs for a fun pool party favor kids can enjoy all summer long. Four colorful bandits in every pack. For children age 5 and older.

• Includes: 4 Toypedo Bandits
